name: yxc
description: YXC (Yangxing Technology) is a leading manufacturer of crystal frequency devices with over 30 years of industry experience, providing comprehensive timing solutions including crystal resonators, crystal oscillators, programmable oscillators, and automotive-grade timing devices.
seoDescription: YXC authorized distributor in China. Stock available: crystal resonators, crystal oscillators, programmable oscillators, differential oscillators, automotive-grade crystals, and ceramic resonators. Technical support, competitive pricing, fast delivery.
seoMetaTitle: YXC Crystal Oscillators and Resonators | Authorized Distributor | BeiLuo
seoMetaDescription: Authorized distributor of YXC crystal products, programmable oscillators, automotive-grade timing devices. Technical support, competitive pricing, fast delivery.
longDescription:
Shenzhen Yangxing Technology Co., Ltd. (YXC) is a national high-tech enterprise with over 30 years of experience in the crystal frequency device industry. As a core distributor of YXC products, BeiLuo Electronics provides comprehensive access to YXC's extensive portfolio of timing solutions.

YXC's product portfolio includes crystal resonators (crystal units), crystal oscillators (SPXO, TCXO, programmable), differential output oscillators, 32.768kHz RTC crystals, ceramic resonators, and automotive-grade timing devices. These precision timing components serve critical applications across consumer electronics, communications, automotive, industrial automation, IoT, and medical equipment.

With a 100,000+ square meter R&D and manufacturing base, YXC has established itself as a technology leader in programmable crystal oscillators, holding multiple patents and winning the National Science and Technology Innovation Award. The company serves customers in over 100 countries and regions, providing high-quality frequency control solutions with excellent reliability and competitive pricing.

seoTitle: YXC Crystal Products | Programmable Oscillators | Authorized Distributor

faqs.question: Is BeiLuo an authorized distributor of YXC products?
faqs.answer: Yes, BeiLuo Electronics is a core distributor of YXC (Yangxing Technology) products with direct authorization from the manufacturer. As a core distributor, we have direct access to YXC's manufacturing facilities and technical resources. Our authorization covers the complete range of YXC frequency control products including crystal resonators, crystal oscillators, programmable oscillators, differential oscillators, and automotive-grade timing devices. We provide 100% genuine YXC products with full manufacturer warranty, traceability documentation, and comprehensive technical support.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to verify our distributor credentials or request a quotation for your YXC crystal requirements.

faqs.question: What makes YXC programmable oscillators unique?
faqs.answer: YXC programmable oscillators represent a breakthrough in timing technology, combining quartz material (QUARTZ) with MEMS technology (Q-MEMS). Key advantages include: Rapid Customization - Program any frequency within the operating range without long lead times; High Precision - Maintains quartz crystal accuracy and stability; Small Form Factor - Miniaturized packages suitable for space-constrained designs; Wide Frequency Range - Supports frequencies from kHz to hundreds of MHz; Low Power Consumption - Optimized for battery-powered applications; Cost Effective - Reduces inventory costs by replacing multiple fixed-frequency parts. YXC holds multiple patents in programmable oscillator technology and has won the National Science and Technology Innovation Award for these products.
faqs.decisionGuide: Explore our programmable oscillator products for applications requiring frequency flexibility and rapid prototyping.

faqs.question: What types of crystal products does YXC offer?
faqs.answer: YXC offers a comprehensive portfolio of frequency control products: Crystal Resonators - Passive quartz crystals in HC-49/S, SMD 1.6x1.2mm to 7.0x5.0mm packages; Crystal Oscillators - SPXO, TCXO, programmable oscillators with various output types; Differential Oscillators - LVDS, LVPECL, HCSL outputs for high-speed communications; 32.768kHz Crystals - Tuning fork crystals for RTC and low-power applications; Ceramic Resonators - Cost-effective alternatives for consumer electronics; Automotive Crystals - AEC-Q200 qualified devices for automotive applications. All products are manufactured in YXC's 100,000+ square meter facility with strict quality control.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our YXC product categories to find the specific crystal type for your application, or contact our FAE team for selection guidance.

faqs.question: How do I select the right YXC crystal for my application?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right YXC crystal involves several key considerations: Frequency Requirements - Determine your target frequency and tolerance; Stability Needs - Choose based on ppm requirements (±10ppm for precision, ±30ppm for general use); Temperature Range - Commercial (0 to +70°C), industrial (-40 to +85°C), or automotive (-40 to +125°C); Package Size - Balance size constraints with performance (smaller packages may have reduced drive level); Load Capacitance - Match with your circuit design for resonators, or choose oscillators for simplified design; Special Features - Consider programmable oscillators for flexibility, differential outputs for high-speed signals. Our FAE team can help analyze your specific requirements and recommend optimal YXC products.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use our crystal selection guide or contact our technical team for personalized recommendations based on your application requirements.

faqs.question: What are the advantages of YXC ceramic resonators?
faqs.answer: YXC ceramic resonators offer distinct advantages for cost-sensitive applications: Cost Effective - Significantly lower cost than quartz crystals, ideal for high-volume consumer products; Compact Size - Available in small SMD packages for space-constrained designs; No External Capacitors - Many ceramic resonators have built-in load capacitance, simplifying circuit design; Fast Startup - Generally faster oscillation startup compared to quartz crystals; Good Reliability - Suitable for consumer electronics with moderate stability requirements; Wide Availability - Standard frequencies readily available from stock. Applications include: TV remote controls, toys, small appliances, and other consumer products where ±0.5% frequency tolerance is acceptable. For applications requiring better precision, YXC quartz crystals are recommended.
faqs.decisionGuide: Choose YXC ceramic resonators for cost-sensitive consumer applications, or YXC quartz crystals for precision requirements.

faqs.question: Does YXC offer automotive-qualified crystal products?
faqs.answer: Yes, YXC offers a comprehensive range of AEC-Q200 qualified crystal products for automotive applications: Automotive Crystal Resonators - Qualified to AEC-Q200 with extended temperature range; Automotive Oscillators - SPXO and TCXO with automotive qualification; Key Features include: Extended Temperature Range - Operating temperature from -40°C to +125°C or higher; Enhanced Reliability - Rigorous testing including temperature cycling, mechanical shock, and vibration; Full Traceability - Complete lot traceability for automotive quality management; Long-term Supply - Production continuity guaranteed for automotive lifecycle requirements; PPAP Support - Full Production Part Approval Process documentation available. These products are ideal for ADAS, infotainment systems, powertrain control, battery management, and body electronics in modern vehicles.
faqs.decisionGuide: Look for AEC-Q200 qualified products in our YXC catalog, or contact our automotive FAE specialist for recommendations.

faqs.question: What technical support does BeiLuo provide for YXC products?
faqs.answer: BeiLuo Electronics provides comprehensive technical support for YXC products: Crystal Selection - Guidance on choosing the right frequency, stability, and package for your application; Circuit Design - Recommendations for load capacitance, drive level, and oscillator circuit design; Programmable Oscillator Support - Assistance with frequency programming and configuration; Layout Advice - PCB layout guidelines for optimal crystal performance and EMI reduction; Failure Analysis - Support for troubleshooting crystal-related issues; Application Notes - Access to YXC technical documentation and reference designs; Sample Support - Evaluation samples for prototyping and testing. Our FAE team has deep expertise in YXC products and frequency control applications, supporting you from concept through production.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our technical support team for assistance with YXC crystal selection, circuit design, or troubleshooting.
